g.onclick: sendPrompt('What goes in the root layout.tsx for the map platform? What providers wrap the app?')
sendPrompt('What is the (map) route group responsible for in the map platform? What shared layout does it provide?')
sendPrompt('What pages live in the (marketing) route group for the map platform? What is its layout?')
sendPrompt('What is the api/ directory responsible for in the map platform app router?')
sendPrompt('What does the main editor page look like at (map)/page.tsx? What components does it render?')
sendPrompt('How should shared map routes like /maps/[id] work in the map platform? What does the dynamic route fetch?')
sendPrompt('What does the landing page for the map platform look like? What sections should it have?')
sendPrompt('Design the api/ai/route.ts endpoint for the map platform. What does the request body look like, and what does it return?')
sendPrompt('Design the api/export/route.ts endpoint. How does it handle PNG and SVG export server-side?')
sendPrompt('What should the loading.tsx fallback look like for the map route group?')
sendPrompt('What should error.tsx handle for the map platform route groups?')
sendPrompt('What does the not-found.tsx page look like for the map platform?')
sendPrompt('What metadata and Open Graph tags should be in app/opengraph-image.tsx for sharing map links?')
sendPrompt('What should sitemap.ts generate for the map platform?')
